definition:
1. to declare, make known , (Pindar) 
2. Pass., future -φᾶνήσομαι, aorist2  κατ-εφάνην [ ᾶ], to become visible, appear , (Homeric Hymns) 
3. to be quite clear  or plain , (Herdotus Historicus); κατεφάνη τῷ Δαρείῳ τεχνάζειν it was apparent to Darius that he was playing tricks, (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
